-- Stopping time scaling lemma
-- E[stopping_time(n)] ∼ 9.77 * ln(n)
theorem collatz_expected_stopping_time :
  ∃ C > 0, ∀ n > 1,
    stopping_time(n) ≤ C * Real.log n := by
  -- Proof sketch: probabilistic heuristic formalization
  -- Each step reduces n by factor ~2/3 on average (when odd ratio → ln2/ln3)
  -- Expected steps to reach 1: log(n) / log(3/2) ≈ 9.77 * ln(n)
  sorry

-- Erdős–Straus family for n ≡ 2 (mod 4)
theorem erdos_straus_mod4_class2 :
  ∀ n : ℕ, n ≡ 2 [MOD 4] → n ≥ 2 →
    ∃ a b c : ℕ, a ≥ 1 ∧ b ≥ 1 ∧ c ≥ 1 ∧
      4 * a * b * c = n * (b * c + a * c + a * b) := by
  -- Construction: a ≈ 0.5 * n
  -- Then solve for b, c from remaining fraction
  sorry

  sorry

formal_verification.lean4_collatz:
-- Auto-generated Lean 4 verification stub
-- Bounded Collatz verification for n ≤ 10000

def collatz_step (n : Nat) : Nat :=
  if n % 2 == 0 then n / 2 else 3 * n + 1

def collatz_orbit (n : Nat) (max_steps : Nat) : List Nat :=
  match max_steps with
  | 0 => [n]
  | k + 1 => if n ≤ 1 then [n] else n :: collatz_orbit (collatz_step n) k

def collatz_reaches_one (n : Nat) (max_steps : Nat) : Bool :=
  (collatz_orbit n max_steps).getLast? == some 1

-- Verification: all n in [2, 10000] reach 1 within 10000 steps
-- #eval (List.range (10000 - 1)).map (· + 2) |>.all (collatz_reaches_one · 10000)
formal_verification.lean4_erdos_straus:
-- Auto-generated Lean 4 verification stub
-- Erdős–Straus conjecture verification for n ≤ 1000

def erdos_straus_check (n : Nat) : Bool :=
  -- Check if 4/n = 1/a + 1/b + 1/c has a solution
  -- Equivalent: 4*a*b*c = n*(b*c + a*c + a*b)
  let a_max := 3 * n / 4 + 1
  (List.range a_max).any fun a_idx =>
    let a := a_idx + n / 4
    if a == 0 then false
    else
      let num := 4 * a - n
      if num ≤ 0 then false
      else
        let den := n * a
        let b_max := 2 * den / num + 1
        (List.range (b_max - a)).any fun b_offset =>
          let b := b_offset + a
          let c_num := num * b - den
          let c_den := den * b
          c_num > 0 && c_den % c_num == 0 && c_den / c_num ≥ b

-- #eval (List.range (1000 - 1)).map (· + 2) |>.all erdos_straus_check
